overview.description: The Defiance R2000 Weekly Distribution ETF (IWMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. IWMY, an actively managed ETF attempting to provide weekly income, targeting a 30% annual distribution, via call option spreads on the Russell 2000 Index. Secondarily, the fund seeks some upside potential on the index. IWMY was launched on Oct 30, 2023 and is issued by Defiance.
